analytical_depth.rationale: Excellent identification of the Q3 FY26 structural break and FII/MF flow divergence. Minor gap: could have explored the differing unit economics of quick commerce vs food delivery more deeply.

logical_consistency.rationale: Highly consistent application of the structural break caveat. Minor gap: the reverse DCF section mentions a 62.6% implied growth rate but doesn't fully reconcile how the structural break impacts this baseline.

completeness.rationale: Covers all sector dimensions well. Missing GMV and take-rate data, but correctly identifies this as a tool limitation and flags it in open questions.

actionability.rationale: Clear verdict and strong risk identification (ONDC, crude oil). Minor gap: could be slightly more specific on near-term catalysts beyond the platform fee hike.

sector_framework.rationale: Perfect adaptation to the platform economy. Explicitly rejects traditional manufacturing metrics (ROCE, PE) in favor of EV/Revenue and unit economics, which is exactly the right lens.

data_sourcing.rationale: Strong citations and effective use of the calculate tool. Minor gap: relies on management commentary for TAM without triangulating with third-party industry reports.

tool_use_discipline.rationale: Mostly disciplined, but hallucinated an invalid section ('estimates') for the get_estimates tool in Turn 13 before correcting to 'consensus' in Turn 21.

cost_efficiency.rationale: 32 turns is highly inefficient (>20 turn threshold), driven by sequential calculate tool calls, though the 87.6% cache hit rate kept costs moderate at $0.62.

issues.issue: Agent called get_estimates with an invalid section argument ('estimates') in Turn 13.
issues.suggestion: Reinforce instructions to strictly verify allowed enum values for tool arguments before execution.

issues.issue: Critical internet platform metrics (GMV, take rate, MTU) are missing from the standard financial toolset.
issues.suggestion: Integrate a specialized alternative data source or management concall extraction tool specifically for internet platform KPIs.

strengths: Brilliant identification of the Q3 FY26 structural break in revenue and material costs, preventing a naive extrapolation of 200%+ growth.
Excellent application of sector-specific frameworks, explicitly rejecting traditional metrics like PE and ROCE for early-stage platforms.
platform.summary: A highly sophisticated sector report that perfectly adapts its analytical framework to the internet platform economy. The agent's identification of a structural break in revenue reporting demonstrates institutional-level critical thinking, though the execution was somewhat inefficient at 32 turns.
